positive: A highly stylized cyberpunk street scene featuring a geisha character with glowing cybernetic implants and holographic kanji characters in the background. Style: Neo-Tokyo, synthwave noir, high contrast lighting, vivid electric blues and reds, cinematic depth, digital painting.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, messy, cartoonish
